warnings: agent-5-whitelabel: INTEGRATION WARNING - ClientLayout uses 'use client' directive — it must be wrapped in a server component for Next.js App Router root layouts. Import ClientLayout from a client-component boundary.

agent-5-whitelabel: INTEGRATION WARNING - generateTenantMetadata is a server function that returns Next.js Metadata — use only in server components and layout.tsx generateMetadata exports, NOT in client components.

agent-5-whitelabel: INTEGRATION WARNING - getTenantConfig makes a public API call to /api/tenants/[slug]/branding — ensure this API route exists (to be built in Round 2 or by agent-2/agent-4). The route must return WhiteLabelConfig shape without auth requirement (branding is intentionally public for SEO/Twitter cards).
agent-5-whitelabel: INTEGRATION WARNING - CSS variables MUST be prefixed with --tenant- to avoid collisions with shadcn/ui radix theme variables (--primary, --background, etc.).

agent-5-whitelabel: INTEGRATION WARNING - Branding colors from agent-2-database are nullable — ClientLayout must handle null colors gracefully by defaulting to EstateFlow corporate brand (#1e40af blue).
agent-5-whitelabel: INTEGRATION WARNING - TenantLogo uses next/image — ensure logo_url domains are added to next.config.js remotePatterns.

agent-5-whitelabel: INTEGRATION WARNING - TenantFavicon dynamically swaps <link> tags — may cause a brief flash of default favicon before tenant favicon loads. Consider preload in <head> via generateTenantMetadata.
